claim: No Stable, release, conformance, or manual assistive-technology claim is made by this source contract.
summary: A named modal or non-modal dialog with deterministic entry, containment, dismissal, viewport, nesting, and restoration policy.
semantics: Modal content uses role=dialog with React Aria modal semantics; non-modal content uses role=dialog without background inerting or a focus trap.
One Title is preferred; aria-label or aria-labelledby is an explicit alternative, and one Description is associated by a stable ID.
Escape and outside interaction are owned by the topmost React Aria overlay; LayerManager registers the actual portal root so visual and dismissal order agree without competing.
A removed trigger restores to finalFocusRef when supplied.

messageKeys.context: Visible default text for Dialog.Close when children are omitted.

preferences.forcedColors: System colors preserve the surface boundary and focus indication without relying on elevation.
preferences.reducedMotion: Entry and exit transforms are removed.
preferences.rtl: Logical spacing and explicit direction propagate through the portal independently from locale.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Surface and close path remain available inside visual-viewport and safe-area bounds.
